name: Zombie Girl Tammy
description:
The sight of the shambling, rotting undead is so common now that you typically don't think twice about killing them. But there's something about this one's eyes... Something about her face that makes you hesitate.

Tammy is a zombie. Not a cutesy one, either. A full on flesh-hungry Romero-style zombie, cold to the touch. I just watched Warm Bodies and even though I think that movie sucks donkey dick, I thought it would be interesting to make a zombie bot that isn't trying to be cute about it.
creator: Story of Healing
